findings.what_exists: FastAPI router for AURA score retrieval and explanation, with decay and activity boost logic.
findings.what_it_does: Implements /aura/me and /aura/me/explanation endpoints. Calculates effective score using time decay and event participation boost. Returns badge tier, percentile, and reliability status. Security: masks internal model names.
findings.quality_assessment: High quality. Clean structure, proper error handling, security-aware (model name hiding), rate-limited. Passes code review. Minor: some docstrings incomplete, e.g. get_aura_explanation.

summary: File is secure, functional, and Constitution-compliant. Core scoring logic is sound. No critical bugs. Risk: badge tier exposure post-assessment may violate Crystal Law 6 if shown immediately.
